lines.english: Hope and desire bind you and lead you on.
Practicing egotism and possessiveness, you have come into the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਹੁ ਜਨ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har kee bhagat karahu jan bhaaee |
lines.english: Worship the Lord in devotion, O humble Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੀ ਮੇਰੀ ਕਰਤ ਕਿਆ ਲੇ ਚਾਲੇ ਬਿਖੁ ਲਾਦੇ ਛਾਰ ਬਿਕਾਰਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: meree meree karat kiaa le chaale bikh laade chhaar bikaaraa he |15|
lines.english: Indulging in egotism and self-conceit, what will you be able to carry with you, except the load of ashes from poison and corruption? ||15||
Speak the Unspoken Speech, and the mind will merge back into the Mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਠਿ ਚਲਤਾ ਠਾਕਿ ਰਖਹੁ ਘਰਿ ਅਪੁਨੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਕਾਟੇ ਕਾਟਣਹਾਰਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: autth chalataa tthaak rakhahu ghar apunai dukh kaatte kaattanahaaraa he |16|
lines.english: Restrain your restless mind within its own home, and the Lord, the Destroyer, shall destroy your pain. ||16||
The Gurmukh loves the Lord; the Gurmukh realizes the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਕੀ ਓਟ ਪਰਾਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: har gur poore kee ott paraatee |
lines.english: I seek the support of the Perfect Guru, the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਿ ਮਤਿ ਊਤਮ ਹਰਿ ਬਖਸੇ ਪਾਰਿ ਉਤਾਰਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੭॥੪॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: naanak raam naam mat aootam har bakhase paar utaaraa he |17|4|10|
lines.english: O Nanak, through the Lord's Name, the intellect is exalted; granting His forgiveness, the Lord carries him across to the other side. ||17||4||10||
Maaroo, First Mehl:
O Divine Guru, I have entered Your Sanctuary.
From the very beginning of time, and throughout the ages, You cherish and sustain Your beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੇ ਚੋਜ ਨ ਜਾਣੈ ਕੋਈ ਤੂ ਪੂਰਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਬਿਧਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tere choj na jaanai koee too pooraa purakh bidhaataa he |1|
lines.english: No one knows Your wondrous plays; You are the perfect Architect of Destiny. ||1||
You are the Almighty Lord, the Merciful Lord.
You are in each and every heart, O Merciful Lord of incomparable beauty.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਵੈ ਚਲਾਵਹਿ ਸਭੁ ਤੇਰੋ ਕੀਆ ਕਮਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jiau tudh bhaavai tivai chalaaveh sabh tero keea kamaataa he |2|
lines.english: As You will, You cause all to walk; everyone acts according to Your Command. ||2||
Deep within the nucleus of all, is the Light of the Life of the World.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਘਟ ਭੋਗੈ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਵਨ ॥
lines.translit: sabh ghatt bhogai har ras peevan |
lines.english: The Lord enjoys the hearts of all, and drinks in their essence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਲੇਵੈ ਆਪੇ ਦੇਵੈ ਤਿਹੁ ਲੋਈ ਜਗਤ ਪਿਤ ਦਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aape levai aape devai tihu loee jagat pit daataa he |3|
lines.english: He Himself gives, and He himself takes; He is the generous father of the beings of the three worlds. ||3||
He placed the soul in the body of air, water and fire.
Creating the world, He has set His play into motion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਹੀ ਨਗਰੀ ਨਉ ਦਰਵਾਜੇ ਸੋ ਦਸਵਾ ਗੁਪਤੁ ਰਹਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: dehee nagaree nau daravaaje so dasavaa gupat rahaataa he |4|
lines.english: The body-village has nine gates; the Tenth Gate remains hidden. ||4||
There are four horrible rivers of fire.
How rare is that Gurmukh who understands this, and through the Word of the Shabad, remains unattached.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਡੂਬਹਿ ਦਾਝਹਿ ਗੁਰਿ ਰਾਖੇ ਹਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਰਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: saakat duramat ddoobeh daajheh gur raakhe har liv raataa he |5|
lines.english: The faithless cynics are drowned and burnt through their evil-mindedness. The Guru saves those who are imbued with the Love of the Lord. ||5||
Water, fire, air, earth and ether

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਹਹਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ਤਜਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਹਉਮੈ ਭ੍ਰਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: satigur sabad raheh rang raataa taj maaeaa haumai bhraataa he |6|
lines.english: Those who remain imbued with the Word of the True Guru's Shabad, renounce Maya, egotism and doubt. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਪੰਚ ਤਤੁ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: tin meh panch tat ghar vaasaa |
lines.english: in that house of the five elements, they dwell.
This mind is drenched with the Shabad, and satisfied.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਚੋਰੁ ਮੁਹੈ ਘਰੁ ਮੰਦਰੁ ਇਨਿ ਸਾਕਤਿ ਦੂਤੁ ਨ ਜਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: antar chor muhai ghar mandar in saakat doot na jaataa he |7|
lines.english: The temple of the body is being plundered by the thieves within, but this faithless cynic does not even recognize these demons. ||7||
Without the Name, what support can anyone have?
They are argumentative demons, terrifying goblins.
These demons stir up conflict and strife.
The body of the false person is just a pile of barren dirt.
Without the Name, what honor can you have?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਵੈ ਪਤਿ ਖੋਈ ਆਵਤ ਜਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: sabad surat bin aavai jaavai pat khoee aavat jaataa he |8|
lines.english: Without awareness of the Shabad, one comes and goes in reincarnation; he loses his honor in this coming and going. ||8||
At Death's door, he is tied up and punished;

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਧੇ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਜੁਗ ਚਾਰੇ ਜਮਕੰਕਰਿ ਕਾਲਿ ਪਰਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: baadhe mukat naahee jug chaare jamakankar kaal paraataa he |9|
lines.english: Bound and gagged throughout the four ages, there is no liberation; the Messenger of Death keeps such a person under his gaze. ||9||
such a sinner does not obtain salvation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣ ਪਲਾਵ ਕਰੇ ਬਿਲਲਾਵੈ ਜਿਉ ਕੁੰਡੀ ਮੀਨੁ ਪਰਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: karan palaav kare bilalaavai jiau kunddee meen paraataa he |10|
lines.english: He cries out in pain, like the fish pierced by the hook. ||10||
The faithless cynic is caught in the noose all alone.
The miserable spiritually blind person is caught in the power of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨੁ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਸੂਝੈ ਆਜੁ ਕਾਲਿ ਪਚਿ ਜਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: raam naam bin mukat na soojhai aaj kaal pach jaataa he |11|
lines.english: Without the Lord's Name, liberation is not known. He shall waste away, today or tomorrow. ||11||
Other than the True Guru, no one is your friend.
Here and hereafter, God is the Savior.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੇਵੈ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਇਉ ਸਲਲੈ ਸਲਲ ਮਿਲਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: raam naam devai kar kirapaa iau salalai salal milaataa he |12|
lines.english: He grants His Grace, and bestows the Lord's Name. He merges with Him, like water with water. ||12||
